testcase.name: test_restore_invalid_json_returns_400

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 400 for invalid JSON, got 422 assert 422 == 400 + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_iteration101_backup.py:165: in test_restore_invalid_json_returns_400 assert response.status_code == 400, f"Expected 400 for invalid JSON, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 400 for invalid JSON, got 422 E assert 422 == 400 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_restore_missing_metadata_returns_400

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 400 for missing metadata, got 422 assert 422 == 400 + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_iteration101_backup.py:174: in test_restore_missing_metadata_returns_400 assert response.status_code == 400, f"Expected 400 for missing metadata, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 400 for missing metadata, got 422 E assert 422 == 400 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_restore_empty_backup_returns_200
testcase.failure: tests/test_iteration101_backup.py:187: in test_restore_empty_backup_returns_200 assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200 for valid empty backup, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200 for valid empty backup, got 422: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","file"],"msg":"Field required","input":null,"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_restore_returns_result_message

failure.message: AssertionError: Response should contain 'message' assert 'message' in {'detail': [{'input': None, 'loc': ['body', 'file'], 'msg': 'Field required', 'type': 'missing', ...}]}

testcase.failure: tests/test_iteration101_backup.py:201: in test_restore_returns_result_message assert "message" in data, "Response should contain 'message'" E AssertionError: Response should contain 'message' E assert 'message' in {'detail': [{'input': None, 'loc': ['body', 'file'], 'msg': 'Field required', 'type': 'missing', ...}]}

testcase.name: test_restore_inserts_new_client
testcase.failure: tests/test_iteration101_backup.py:229: in test_restore_inserts_new_client assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_restore_skips_duplicate_client
testcase.failure: tests/test_iteration101_backup.py:253: in test_restore_skips_duplicate_client assert response1.status_code == 200 E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
